creator: dnewman@networktest.com
text:
ps. Here is the 0-length log file. Could this be a permissions issue with logging?

[dnewman@example ~]$ sudo ls -la /home/greg.lemond/.local/share/xrdp
total 16
drwxr-xr-x  2 greg.lemond  greg.lemond  512 Aug 16 18:58 .
drwx------  7 greg.lemond  greg.lemond  512 Aug 16 18:55 ..
-rw-r--r--  1 greg.lemond  greg.lemond    0 Aug 16 18:58 xrdp-chansrv.0.log
